title: RBI (Local Area Banks – Resolution of Stressed Assets) Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
RBI introduced a new framework to address loan stress caused by natural calamities in local area banks. It mandates time-bound restructuring and coordinated decision-making through banking committees. 
The post RBI (Local Area Banks – Resolution of Stressed Assets) Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
